channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Hydroneer coming to PS5, Xbox Series on May 8
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Mining and automation sandbox game currently available for PC.

Foulball Hangover will release mining and automation sandbox game Hydroneer for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on May 8, exactly six years after its initial PC (Steam) release, the developer announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Foulball Hangover:

Hydroneer became a tremendous sleeper hit among the crafting and basebuilding genres, selling over a million copies on Steam since launch. Subsequent overhauls and additions of new features, including couch cooperative multiplayer, grew the game’s presence into a persistent online fanbase.

Hydroneer gameplay features will remain fully faithful to its PC release, but optimizations are being implemented in order to adapt the interface and controls for console.

  • A hands-on mining and crafting system that sees players quite literally dig through the dirt to find smeltable ore and valuable gemstones.
  • Conveyor belts, automated harvesters, drills, and piping to shape and craft full automated smelting factories and pull ore out of the earth at scale.
  • An open world with multiple dig sites, NPC communities, quest-givers, and stores to interact with.
    Unique couch cooperative multiplayer feature, allowing up to four players to work together in tandem on their engineering projects.

The coming console release will also include the Journey to Volcalidus expansion, first released in 2024. Journey to Volcalidus will be sold separately to the main game and include:

  • A whole new world map in the land of Volcalidus, with an enormous sprawling world that is over six times the size of the original game world.
  • Make use of the new automation technology powered by lava, introducing a new category of mining tech that allows players to dig deep into the ice shelves of Volcalidus.
  • A brand-new settlement in New Glade, where the players are given a full town to rebuild from the ground up, providing an idyllic refuge from the harsh climate while also unlocking new items for purchase as the town is restored.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/hydroneer-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-may-8
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Physics-based platformer Ballgame announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Human Computer has announced Ballgame, a physics-based platformer featuring “high-stakes tournaments, physics-bending parlor games, and pinball-inspired courses.” It will launch for PC via Steam in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Smash, bounce, and grind your way through Ballgame, a ballsy physics platformer where you ARE the ball. Compete in high-stakes tournaments, physics-bending parlor games, and pinball-inspired courses that are anything but golf!

Key Features

  • It’s a Whole New Ballgame – Golf like never before: Ballgame is the new ball game that’s bonkers, chaotic, merciless, and rewarding. You don’t hit the ball—you are the ball. Play as Dolf, a newly sentient golf ball smashing, bouncing, and grinding your way through high-stakes tournaments and physics-bending parlor games.
  • Precision Physics Platformer – At its core, Ballgame is simple: get from the tee to the hole in as few shots as possible. Simplicity becomes complex in handcrafted courses with platforming challenges, balancing precise shots, and controlled mayhem. Improve every swing and navigate obstacles and objects: spike off bumpers, grind on rails, float in a bubble, die on spikes, and control the chaos. Every shot is a kinetic reaction.
  • Master the Roll – Ballgame is rewarding and ruthless. Master every shot, ride curves, bend the bounce, shape the roll, and dominate every tournament. Each stroke is a chance to improve and score higher on the leaderboard. We’ve smashed together the skills of every ball game: golf, pinball, pachinko, skee-ball… You name it. Precision is everything; but, happy accidents make every course fun to master.
  • Build Your Ballmanac – Stay on the ball, win tournaments, then test your mastery in the Parlor. It’s filled with chaotic arcade-style minigames where precision meets probability. Each trip to the Parlor earns you Figment, Ballgame‘s currency. Ball so hard with customizations, upgrades, and over 99 balls to unlock and discover along the way.
  • Momentum is Everything – Our team at Human Computer plans to launch Ballgame later in 2026. We have a ton of features and ideas for launch and beyond. However, we want to build Ballgame with you. Look for a Steam demo in the coming months and in the meantime, share ideas and thoughts with us on socials or in the Steam community hub. We read everything!

W

Watch the announcement trailer bleow.

Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/physics-based-platformer-ballgame-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
